headline: COWG Is Up While QQQ Slips. What the Free Cash Flow Screen Is Actually Doing
summary: Most ETF names tell you what they own. COWG tells you what it believes in. Pacer US Large Cap Cash Cows Growth Leaders ETF (NYSEARCA:COWG) screens for large-cap US companies generating strong projected free cash flows with above-average earnings growth, a methodology that sounds straightforward but produces a portfolio that looks nothing like the S&P ... headline: KLA Investor Day Expectations Around Growth Model And Valuation Risks
summary: KLA (NasdaqGS:KLAC) has been placed on a 30-day positive Catalyst Watch ahead of its March 12 Investor Day. Investors are watching for potential new product announcements and an updated long term financial model at the event. The focus is on how upcoming disclosures may clarify KLA's business direction and market share ambitions. KLA enters this Catalyst Watch period with its share price at $1,441.35 and a 5 year return of 416.5%. The stock is up 13.1% year to date and 107.8% over the past...
